remarks: Nestled on a picturesque tree-lined street in the heart of Springdale, this beautifully expanded & meticulously renovated home offers the perfect blend of luxury, comfort, & convenience. Designed for effortless entertaining & everyday living, the stunning chef's kitchen opens seamlessly to a spacious family rm, creating the ideal gathering space. A gracious living room w/fireplace & an elegant dining room provide both formal & informal spaces to relax and entertain. Upstairs, the spectacular expanded primary suite is a private retreat offering exceptional space, comfort, & style. Three additional bedrooms provide flexibility for guests, home office space, or changing lifestyle needs. Thoughtful updates & quality craftsmanship are evident throughout, including an exterior generator hookup for peace of mind. Outside, enjoy a charming, manageable backyard perfect for outdoor dining, entertaining, or simply unwinding. Despite its peaceful neighborhood setting, this home is a commuter's dream, just a short walk to the Springdale train station w/direct access to New York City. Within walking distance to Twin Rinks, local restaurants, shops, & neighborhood amenities. Stamford's vibrant downtown, featuring exceptional dining, theaters, nightlife, & premier shopping, is just minutes away. A rare opportunity to own a move-in ready home in one of Stamford's most sought-after neighborhoods. Combining timeless style, modern updates, & an unbeatable location, this is one you won't to miss
